resources.string: Chatforia i helpim ol manmeri long konektim ol narapela tokples, ol divais, na ol boda.
Olgeta manmeri i ken kisim rot
Yu ken makim hau ol toksave i kamap, wanem taim ol i lus, na hau akaun bilong yu i stap gut.

Chatforia em i wanpela gutpela, planti tokples mesenja wantaim \'end-to-end\' enkripsen, \'instant translation\', na \'voice/video colling\'. Wok bilong mipela em i isi: helpim ol manmeri long konektim - gut, praivet, na long ol narapela narapela tokples.
Ol i save haitim ol toksave long divais bilong yu pastaim long ol i lusim. Translesen, bekap, na divais sink em ol i wokim bilong daunim wanem samting ol seva bilong mipela i ken lukim.
Ol \'end-to-end encryption\' na \'privacy controls\' i stap insait long Chatforia stat long stat.
Olgeta i ken kisim: Oto-transletim 100+ tokples.
Kontrol: Ol mesej we i lus na ol risit bilong ritim em i opsenel.
Kontrol: Ol mesej we i lus na ol risit we yu ritim em i opsenel.
Ol opsen bilong mekim Chatforia i isi long yusim na yu no nidim krai.
Putim wanpela \'transcript\' long ol odio mesej yu kisim.
Sais bilong rait bilong ol tok
Ol senis i save stap hariap.
Larim ol \'live caption\' long taim bilong kol (Premium)
Fles skrin long inkoming kol\nSotpela lait i lait taim wanpela kol i ring.
Sotpela lait i lait taim wanpela kol i ring.
Stat long nomol sais. Yu mas skruim sapos yu laikim bikpela teks.
Soim ol \'real-time\' kapsen long odio bilong narapela patisipen.
No inap long lodim ol seting
Ol toksave bilong ol mesej na kol\nSoim ol \'baner\' na \'title blink\' bai yu no ken lusim ektiviti.
Ol lain i ken lukluk long autsait i kam i go insait
Sekim long ol nupela toksave (taim ol i sapotim)\nKirapim vaibresen bilong divais wantaim ol toksave.
Kirapim vaibresen bilong divais wantaim ol toksave.
Sekim long ol nupela toksave (taim ol i sapotim)
Ol toksave bilong lukluk long ol mesej na kol
Soim ol \'baner\' na \'title blink\' bai yu no ken lusim ektiviti.
Yu no inap putim yu yet olsem wanpela kontek.
Putim wanpela fon namba o yusa nem.
Lukluk bilong yusa i no kamap gut.
Mipela i save givim sampela samting tu long Google AdSense. Ol sponsasip i stap—yusim fom aninit.
Mipela i save givim tu ol samting long Google AdSense. Yu ken makim Chatforia wantaim pablisa ID {{pubId}}, o yusim fom aninit long kisim ol sponsasip.

Go long ol manmeri husat i save salim ol toksave wantaim ol gutpela plesmen we i no gat hevi long en. Mipela i save givim ol \'banner inventory\' long ol ples we planti manmeri i save lukim, ol sponsasip, na ol promo bilong haus. Ol premium sabskraiba i no save lukim ol edvetaismen.
Opim email klaien bilong yu long salim askim...
Yu ken tokim mipela long kempen bilong yu
Plis raitim nem, email, na toksave.
Tenkyu! Askim bilong yu i wok long kamap. Mipela bai bihainim klostu taim.
Tenkyu! Mipela bai toktok klostu taim.
Taim yu salim, yu wanbel long
Mipela i wok long pinisim ol ad inventori bilong mipela. Yu ken tokim mipela long kempen bilong yu na mipela bai rekomendim ol plesmen.
Ol sais we ol i orait long en
Ol stretpela dil o program long rot bilong AdSense/Google Ads
Bikpela sesen frikwensi na taim bilong stap insait long toktok UI
Ol taim we ol i sponsaim (olsem, \"Statim wanpela Toktok\" modal) i stap
Tanim ol toksave i kam insait
Bosim tanim tok, ol gutpela bekim, na ol bekim bilong ForiaBot.
Maski ol tok nogut insait long ol tingting bilong AI
Sapos i stap, ol tingting we AI i givim bek bai i gat ol tok i stap hait
No inap long sevim ol seting bilong AI
Ol samting yu laikim long AI i sevim
Salim ol laspela sampela mesej yu kisim (ol i bin klinim) i go long AI long givim kwik bekim.
Tanim olgeta toksave i kam insait
Fri i gat ol besik samting insait long en. Apgredim long opim moa tim.
Putim wanpela man antap long statim...
Enkripsen bilong pinis i go long pinis, tanim tok i go long 100+ tokples, ol toksave i lus, na toktok/vidio kol.
Long desktop? Sken wantaim fon bilong yu long kisim dispela ap.
Putim wanpela nem o wanpela fon namba we yu bin sevim.
Dispela email i stap pinis long yusim.
Plis sekim infomesen bilong yu na traim gen.
Wanpela bilong ol veliu i no stret.
Rejistresen i no kamap. Plis traim gen.
Plis kisim SMS tok orait long go het.
Planti traim tumas. Plis wet na traim gen.
Dispela yusa nem o email i stap pinis.
Yu mas yusim nem bilong yusa.
Dispela yusa nem i kisim pinis.
Ol toksave i lus na ol risit bilong ritim
Enkripsen bilong pinis i go long pinis, i stap oltaim
Praivesi-pastaim. Data bilong yu, kontrol bilong yu.
Brukim ol hevi bilong tok ples insait long ol toktok bilong yu
Ol toksave i lus na ol risit bilong ritim
Enkripsen bilong pinis i go long pinis
Praivesi-pastaim. Data bilong yu, kontrol bilong yu.
Gutpela toksave bilong olgeta manmeri, long wanem hap
i toktok long tok ples bilong yu
Ol i no gat pe long ringim na salim teks. Ol gutpela AI na ol gutpela samting i mas kisim nupela \'upgrade\'.
Gutpela toksave bilong olgeta manmeri, long wanem hap — wantaim

Kisim wanpela fri sekyua fon namba long ringim na salim teks long olgeta hap bilong wol long Wi-Fi o data. Amamas long \'end-to-end\' enkripsen, ol toksave we i lus, na HD voes/vidio kol — wantaim ol tul we i stap insait long en we i helpim yu long stap konek long ol narapela kantri.
Dispela masin i gat narapela enkripsen ki. Givim bek stretpela ki bilong kisim ol mesej bilong yu.
Dispela divais i no gat \'encryption key\' bilong yu. Putim bek long ritim ol \'encrypted messages\'.
Dispela divais i no gat \'encryption key\' bilong yu. Putim bek long ritim olpela \'encrypted messages\'.
Minimum 6-pela leta. Yusim wanpela strongpela, narakain paswod.
Yusim long verifikasen, sekyuriti, na SMS ol samting we i gat sapot.

Taim yu wokim wanpela akaun, yu wanbel long kisim ol SMS toksave i go long wok bilong yu long Chatforia (olsem ol toksave i kam long ol narapela yusa). Ol \'message\' na \'data rates\' i ken kamap. Yu ken lusim long wanem taim yu laikim insait long Setings.
Yu mas makim wanpela yusa nem
I no inap long salim gen verifikasen email.
Long desktop? Sken wantaim fon bilong yu long kisim dispela ap.
Sken long daunlodim ap o opim long \'browser\' bilong yu.
Ol i bin wokim akaun bilong yu, tasol \'secure key setup\' i no wok gut long dispela divais. Plis traim gen.
Salim i no wok. Sekim konsol long kisim moa toksave.
Sesen bilong yu i pinis. Plis sainim gen.
Sain ap long stat long salim ol mesej long Chatforia
Plis tok orait long ol SMS mesej o rausim fon namba.
Mi orait long kisim ol SMS mesej i kam long Chatforia.
Praivet, enkripted, na trensletim mesejing — hariap tru.
Taim yu wokim wanpela akaun, yu wanbel long ol \'Terms of Service\' na \'Privacy Policy\' bilong mipela.
Tip: Yusim wankain akaun long web na mobail. Ol toksave bilong yu i stap wankain.
Yu mas yusim nem bilong yusa.
Plis putim wanpela gutpela email adres.
Verifikasen email i go pinis. Sekim inboks bilong yu.
Akaun i kamap pinis. Plis sekim email bilong yu long sekim akaun bilong yu pastaim long yu log in.
Plis sekim email bilong yu pastaim long yu log in.
Yu save tru olsem yu laik rausim plen bilong yu hariap? Dispela i no inap long kamap bek.
No inap long rausim plen bilong yu nau. Plis traim gen o yusim \'Manage billing\'.
Noken yusim edvetaismen wantaim Plus, o opim ol AI tul na stretim wantaim Premium.
Besik akses long Chatforia wantaim ol bikpela samting bilong salim toksave.
Ad-fri akses wantaim longpela histori na ol samting bilong salim i go.
Ful akses long premium kastomaisesen, AI tuls, na praioriti sapot.
Besik akses long Chatforia wantaim ol bikpela samting bilong salim toksave.
Ad-fri akses wantaim longpela histori na ol samting bilong salim i go.
Ful akses long premium kastomaisesen, AI tuls, na praioriti sapot.
Ekspiriens we i no gat edvetaismen
Ekspiriens we i no gat edvetaismen
Yu stap long fri plen. Apgredim long opim moa samting.
Ol samting we i kamap gutpela moa
No inap long putim plen bilong yu.
No inap long opim \'billing portal\' nau.
Long stap gut long intanet yu no nidim bikpela save long teknikel samting - yu mas luksave, was gut, na tingting gut. Sapos yu gat ol stretpela pasin, yu inap long toktok gut wantaim na yu no pret.

Toktok long intanet i mekim isi moa long toktok wantaim ol manmeri long olgeta hap bilong wol. Maski yu salim mesej i go long ol pren, bungim ol nupela manmeri, o wok bung wantaim long wok, ol mesejing pletfom i save mekim bikpela wok long laip bilong yu long olgeta de. Tasol, stap gut long intanet em i bikpela samting wankain olsem stap konek.

Wanpela bikpela lo bilong sefti long intanet em long abrusim pasin bilong serim ol sensitif infomesen bilong yu yet. Dispela i gat atres bilong haus bilong yu, ol ditel bilong mani, ol paswod, o ol infomesen bilong luksave long yu we ol i ken yusim long rong wei. Maski yu toktok nating, em i gutpela long tingim gut wanem samting yu serim na husat yu serim wantaim.
Lukautim ol pesonel infomesen bilong yu

Toktok wantaim rispek i helpim long kamapim gutpela ples bilong olgeta manmeri. Noken mekim ol toktok nogut o tok nogut, na tingim olsem wanem ol toktok bilong yu inap long mekim sampela samting long ol narapela. Ol gutpela wok bung i save helpim olgeta yusa long kisim gutpela ekspiriens.

Ol nupela \'messaging\' pletfom olsem Chatforia i save givim ol tul bilong helpim ol yusa long stap gut. Ol samting olsem \'blocking\', \'reporting\', na \'privacy control\' em ol i wokim bilong givim ol yusa kontrol long ekspiriens bilong ol. Sapos wanpela i mekim pasin i no stret o mekim yu i no stap isi, yu mas yusim ol dispela tul hariap.
Yusim ol sefti samting we i stap insait long en

Ol man bilong giaman i save yusim ol \'messaging platform\' long giamanim ol yusa long serim ol pesonel infomesen o salim mani. Lukaut long ol toksave we i luk olsem i gutpela tumas long kamap tru, olsem ol ofa yu no tingim, ol askim yu mas mekim hariap, o ol link yu no save long en. Oltaim sekim aidentiti bilong man yu toktok wantaim pastaim long yu mekim wanpela samting.
Hau long toktok gut long intanet

Taim dijitel komunikesen i wok long gro, wok bilong lukautim sefti na tras i kamap bikpela samting moa. Taim ol i bihainim ol besik sefti praktis na yusim ol tul we i stap, ol yusa i ken amamas long ol gutpela samting bilong salim toksave na daunim ol hevi.
Bilong wanem Onlain Sefti i Bikpela Samting

Wanpela bikpela senis long sait bilong toktok em i daunim ol hevi bilong ples. Ol manmeri i ken toktok wantaim ol narapela manmeri long wol klostu long taim stret. Maski em i bilong ol toktok bilong yu yet, bisnis, o wok bung wantaim, ol \'messaging platform\' i mekim \'distance\' i no bikpela tumas.

Bihain taim bilong global komunikesen bai i gat ol moa gutpela tul, olsem AI-assisted messaging, gutpela trenslesen, na gutpela yusa ekspiriens. Taim teknoloji i wok long senis, toktok bai kamap isi na isi long kisim.

Toktok i bin kamap hariap tru long ol laspela tenpela yia. Samting we bipo i nidim ol fon kol o bung wantaim ol narapela, nau ol i ken mekim hariap long rot bilong ol \'messaging platform\'. Taim teknoloji i wok long kamap gutpela, global komunikesen i wok long kamap hariap, isi long kisim, na inklusiv.
Ol pletfom olsem Chatforia em i hap bilong dispela senis, na helpim ol manmeri long konektim isi moa long ol narapela tokples na boda.

Taim toktok i kamap moa dijitel, praivesi na sekyuriti i kamap bikpela samting moa. Ol yusa i laikim bilip olsem ol toktok bilong ol i stap gut. Ol samting olsem \'encryption\' na ol \'user-controlled settings\' i helpim long sapotim gutpela toktok.

Spit em i wanpela bikpela samting we i save stiaim toktok bilong nau. Ol yusa i ting olsem ol toksave bai kamap hariap, na ol infrastraksa bilong nau i sapotim dispela tingting. Real-taim mesejing i save mekim ol toktok i kamap gutpela na isi.

Long bipo yet, tok ples i bin stap olsem wanpela bikpela samting we i save pasim rot bilong toktok long olgeta hap bilong wol. Nau yet, ol tul bilong tanim tok i helpim long pasim dispela hevi. Ol pletfom olsem Chatforia i larim ol yusa long toktok isi moa maski ol i toktok long ol narapela narapela tokples, na dispela i kamapim ol nupela sans bilong koneksen na kliagut.
Lukluk long ol tingting long sait bilong toktok, sefti long intanet, na hau teknoloji bilong salim toksave i wok long bungim ol manmeri long olgeta hap bilong wol.
Hau long toktok gut long intanet
Bilong wanem ol pletfom bilong salim toksave i bikpela samting

Ol manmeri i save yusim ol mesejing ap long toktok wantaim ol pren, famili, na wanwok long olgeta de. Maski em i wanpela kwik apdet o wanpela longpela toktok, mesejing i givim wanpela gutpela na fleksibel rot bilong stap long toktok.

Ol toksave i wok long senis wantaim ol nupela samting olsem ol bekim we AI i yusim, tanim tok, na serim ol samting long planti samting. Taim teknoloji i go het, ol \'messaging platforms\' bai kamap strong moa na i gat planti samting long en.

Ol \'messaging platform\' i save konektim ol manmeri long olgeta hap bilong wol. Wantaim intanet, ol yusa i ken toktok maski ol i stap long wanem hap, na dispela i mekim isi long kamapim ol rilesensip na wok bung wantaim ol narapela kantri.

Ol \'messaging platforms\' i kamap wanpela bikpela samting bilong toktok long nau. Stat long ol toktok bilong yu yet i go inap long ol wok bisnis, ol mesejing ap i larim ol manmeri long stap konek hariap na gut.
Chatforia i kamap wantaim ol dispela as tingting, na i givim wanpela hariap, seif, na yusa-frendli mesejing ekspiriens bilong wanpela konekted wol.

Ol nupela mesejing pletfom i lukluk long givim ol yusa kontrol long data na toktok bilong ol. Ol samting olsem \'encryption\', \'privacy settings\', na \'message controls\' i larim ol yusa long toktok gut wantaim.

Wanpela bikpela gutpela samting bilong ol \'messaging platform\' em i spit bilong ol. Ol toksave i save kamap hariap tru, na dispela i larim ol yusa long toktok long taim stret. Dispela level bilong isi i mekim na planti manmeri i save laikim moa rot bilong toktok wantaim ol manmeri.
Bilong wanem ol mesejing pletfom i bikpela samting moa long bipo
Ol kol bilong yu i no long taim i go pinis bai kamap hia.
No inap long putim histri bilong ol kol.
No inap long lodim histri bilong ol kol
Man o meri bilong raun raun

Vidio koling em i stap tasol long ol manmeri husat i yusim ap nau.
Hau long aplaim: Yusim baten aninit long salim email na ol link bilong yu.
Salim resume bilong yu long email

Mipela i wanpela liklik lain we i kirapim Chatforia - wanpela praivet, global mesenja we i wok long kamap long web, iOS, na Android. Sapos yu tingim praivesi, enkripsen, na ol gutpela yusa ekspiriens, mipela i laik harim tok bilong yu.

Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Enkripsen Enjinia, Telekom Enjinia (Twilio + eSIM).

• Helpim long kamapim as bilong wanpela nupela global mesenja.
• Salim ol impruvmen we ol i yusim long web, iOS, na Android.
• Wok stret wantaim man i bin kirapim dispela wok long sait bilong 'architecture' na 'product direction'.
• Yu mas gat ol bikpela eria bilong stak: mesejing, nek, vidio, enkripsen, telekom, AI.
• Joinim long stat — pastaim long ol yusa i go antap.
Bilong wanem yu mas joinim nau?
